params.prompt: Vertical portrait brand social tile for a barbershop, near 4:5 aspect, cover/title card for a carousel. Background: high-contrast black and white editorial photography, duotone grading with a warm golden-yellow rim/key light used only as an implied light source, never a flat color wash. Scene: a tight overhead flat-lay of barbershop grooming tools only, arranged neatly on dark leather with a folded dark towel nearby -- an open straight razor, a wide-tooth comb, a pair of barber scissors, a professional electric hair/beard clipper machine (trimmer with visible blade guard), a nail clipper, and a dark sleep eye mask (like the one used for a massage chair) -- no shop interior or architecture visible, no people, just the objects filling the frame, dramatic directional light, moody confident atmosphere, no straight color photography. Add a dark ink (#101010) gradient scrim across the lower half for text legibility. Top-left: a small solid Nordic-yellow (#FFD200) pill-shaped tag containing bold condensed uppercase sans-serif text 'CUIDADO PERSONAL' in dark ink letters, tight letter tracking. Center-lower area: a large headline reading '5 HABITOS DEL HOMBRE MODERNO', set in the hand-cut marker lettering style shown in the second reference image (a font character map) -- reproduce that exact letterform style, all uppercase, tight line height, wrapping across two or three lines as needed -- where the word MODERNO is solid Nordic yellow (#FFD200) and the rest of the words are solid bone-white (#F7F4EC), no other colors on the headline. Directly below the headline, one short line of clean condensed grotesk sans-serif body text in bone-white at reduced opacity, reading: 'Del corte a la calma: las rutinas que marcan la diferencia. Desliza para verlas.' Bottom-right corner: place the exact logo lockup shown in the first reference image (a white Viking helmet mark beside the words NORDIC / Barber Shop, already on a black background) completely unchanged and at small watermark scale -- do not invent, redraw, alter proportions, recolor, or add glow/shadow to this logo; blend its black background seamlessly into the tile's own ink-black canvas so no visible box or seam appears around it. Keep the overall canvas ink-black (#101010) dominant, yellow only as a small accent never exceeding about 10-15% of the frame.
